zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert le Blount於大約1120年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，他的父親William le Blount 3rd Baron Of Ixworth26歲，母親Sarah Munchensy22歲。他與Agnes de Lisle結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1188年在英國享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert le Blount于大约1120年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，他的父亲William le Blount 3rd Baron Of Ixworth26岁，母亲Sarah Munchensy22岁。他与Agnes de Lisle结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1188年在英国享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Thanh, Hung, Minh, Dung, Tuan, Hai, Hoa, Thuy, Son, Anh, Long, Hoang.  Chinese Hong, Sang, Chi, Dong, Tong, Lai, Hang, Man, Han, Ho, Phoung, Chan.  Korean Tam, Phong, Nam, Thai, Tuong, Chung, Thach, Tinh, Manh, Tham, Uyen, Vang.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 樂, meaning ‘happiness’ in Chinese: from the first element of the personal name Le Fu (樂父), style name of Yan, son of the Duke Dai of Song (ruler of the state of Song, reigned 799–766  BC ). Yan's grandson Le Ju (樂莒) inherited Le (樂) as his surname.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 勒: (i) from the second element of the placename Shu-Le (疏勒), an ancient state (located in present-day Xinjiang Uyghur autonomous region) during the Western Han dynasty (206  BC –25  AD ). (ii) a surname near the Bohai Sea region during the Han dynasty (206  BC –220  AD ). (iii) a surname traced back to the Hun ethnic group in northern China during the Jin dynasty (265–420  AD ).

variants.name: Yue
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Chi, Feng, Gang, Wei, Chun, Guo, Jin, Kin, Ping, Yan, Yun, Zhang, Chau, Du, Hau, Hung, My, Sau.

Mandarin form of the surname 岳 (or 嶽), meaning ‘high mountain’ in Chinese: traced back to Si Yue (四岳 or 四嶽), said to be the title of an official post in charge of sacrificial rituals on the site of famous mountains during the reign of the legendary Emperor Yao (c. 24th century BC ) and Emperor Shun (c. 23rd century BC ).

variants.name: Lok
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ping, Tat, Wing, Ying Lin, Chi Ming, Ching Wah, Chun, Chung Man, Han, Kam, Kam Tim, Kin.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 樂, see   Le   1.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 陸, 鹿, 逯 and 禄, see   Lu   5 and (7-9).

variants.name: Li
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ming, Li, Jian, Hong, Yan, Ping, Jing, Yong, Ying, Hui, Jin, Min, Chung.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 李, meaning ‘plum’: (i) said to have been adopted in place of the Chinese surname 理 (also pronounced Li; meaning ‘rules’ in Chinese) by Li Zhen (利貞), son of an official called Li Zheng (理徵) in the late Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). It is said that Li Zhen's father incurred the displeasure of King Zhou of Shang (died 1046  BC ) and Li Zhen fled to a wasteland area, where he survived on wild plums. After his return to civilization, he changed his surname to Li (李 ‘plum’), a word with the same pronunciation. The original surname, 理, is said to be from Li Guan (理官), the name of a post of officials in charge of legislation in ancient China. Li Er (李耳), also known as Lao Tzu or Lao Zi, traditionally regarded as the founder of Taoism, is believed to have been a descendant of Li Zhen. (ii) adopted as a surname by the Chi Li (叱李) family from the Xianbei ethnic group during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) in the early years of the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ), sixteen high officials with different surnames were granted the surname Li (李), the surname of the royal family of the Tang dynasty, by Emperor Taizong of Tang (died 649  BC ), because of their contributions to the establishment of the Tang regime. (iv) the surname can also be traced back to several minority ethnic groups in ancient China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 黎, meaning ‘black’ or ‘multitude’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Li (黎), the name of an ancient state (located in Changzhi in Shanxi province) during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ), which was annexed in the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ) and later granted to Fengshu, also known as Li Hou (黎侯, 'Marquis Li'). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Su Li (素黎) family, members of the Xianbei ethnic group, during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert le Blount was born about 1120, in Staffordshire, England, his father, William le Blount 3rd Baron Of Ixworth, was 26 and his mother, Sarah Munchensy, was 22. He married Agnes de Lisle. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1188, in England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert le Blount est né environ 1120, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, William le Blount 3rd Baron Of Ixworth, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Sarah Munchensy, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Lisle. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1188, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert le Blount um 1120 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William le Blount 3rd Baron Of Ixworth 26 und seine Mutter Sarah Munchensy 22. Er hat Agnes de Lisle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1188 im Alter von 70 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert le Blount è nato il circa 1120 nel Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, William le Blount 3rd Baron Of Ixworth, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Munchensy, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Lisle. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1188, nel England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert le Blountが約1120年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父William le Blount 3rd Baron Of Ixworthは26歳，母Sarah Munchensyは22歳であった。Agnes de Lisleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1188年にイギリスで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert le Blount(이)가 대략 1120년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William le Blount 3rd Baron Of Ixworth(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Munchensy(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Agnes de Lisle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1188년 영국에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert le Blount nasceu aproximadamente 1120, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William le Blount 3rd Baron Of Ixworth, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Munchensy, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Lisle. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1188, em Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert le Blount родился около 1120 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William le Blount 3rd Baron Of Ixworth было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Munchensy, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Lisle. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1188 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 70 лет.
